description:
Plumbing-only ticket: add `fz interp <path>` subcommand that prints \"interp path not yet wired\" and exits 75 (EX_TEMPFAIL). Extend tests/fixture_matrix.rs to accept `interp` in `# paths:`; when seen, invoke `fz interp <path>` and tolerate exit 75 with a warning. This makes every subsequent ticket measurable by adding `interp` to a fixture's paths and watching the matrix go red, then green.

## Acceptance

- `fz interp fixtures/add1.fz` exits 75 with the placeholder message.
- A test fixture (or env var) demonstrates `# paths: jit, interp` is parsed; interp warnings logged but matrix passes.
- Phase 5.2+ children flip this to a real implementation by going from \"exit 75 + warn\" to \"exit 0 + stdout match\".
title: fz interp subcommand + matrix interp path (stub)
